disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long-standing severe rheumatoid arthritis of ~10 years, treated with methotrexate and prednisolone
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any ongoing health conditions?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had bad rheumatoid arthritis for about ten years. I take methotrexate and a steroid tablet for it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Six months of fatigue that did not improve after a 3-month trial of oral iron tablets, now ceased
trigger_question_examples: How long have you been feeling tired?
Have you tried anything for the tiredness?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The tiredness has been building for about six months. I tried iron tablets for three months but they didn't help at all, so I stopped them last week.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Abrupt worsening over the last 12 hours with new breathlessness and palpitations on minimal exertion
trigger_question_examples: What happens when you try to move around?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Since this morning it's got dramatically worse — I get breathless and my heart races just walking a few steps to the bathroom.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Exertional light-headedness and unsteadiness on standing, now confined to bed/chair
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel dizzy or faint when you stand?
Are you able to move around safely?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: When I stand I feel weak and a bit unsteady, so I've mostly stayed in bed and the chair today.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No chest pain, no radiation to arm or jaw, no sweating with the episodes
trigger_question_examples: Any chest pain, pressure, or pain spreading to your arm or jaw?
Do you break out in a cold sweat with it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, there's no chest pain or anything spreading, and I'm not sweaty — it's just the breathlessness and the racing heart when I move.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No black or tarry stools, no vomiting of blood, appetite normal
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any black, tarry, or bloody stools?
Have you vomited anything that looked like blood or coffee grounds?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing like that — no black stools and no blood when I'm sick. My appetite has been fine.
